name: gymstant
author: F10.0RD / Signal Labs
description: A floating workflow teaching and verification assistant.

scripts.build:recorder: swiftc electron/native/workflow-event-recorder.swift -o electron/native/workflow-event-recorder && mkdir -p 'electron/native/Gymstant Event Recorder.app/Contents/MacOS' && cp electron/native/workflow-event-recorder 'electron/native/Gymstant Event Recorder.app/Contents/MacOS/workflow-event-recorder' && cp electron/native/recorder-app/Contents/Info.plist 'electron/native/Gymstant Event Recorder.app/Contents/Info.plist' && codesign --force --deep --sign 'Apple Development: quan.stewart@yahoo.com (T4H296K77R)' 'electron/native/Gymstant Event Recorder.app'
scripts.pack:mac: npm run build && npm run build:recorder && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dir
scripts.pack:mac:zip: npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac zip --publish never
scripts.pack:win:portable: npm run build && electron-builder --win portable --x64 --publish never
